name: V2 - Module 4B - AI PG Blurb Insert Into PG Pack Doc

nodes.name: Manual Trigger
nodes.notes: Manual trigger only for Module 4B MVP. Do not activate automatically.

nodes.name: Read Central - Property Registry
nodes.notes: Reads only from Clarity V2 - Central Database / Property Registry. Does not read boss sheets.

nodes.name: Select Module 4B Row
nodes.notes: Selects only 1 active listing with an existing PG Pack Google Doc and no completed AI blurb marker.

nodes.name: Build OpenAI PG Blurb Request
nodes.notes: Builds a privacy-safe prompt from Property Registry fields. Exact unit number is not passed to the AI prompt.

nodes.name: OpenAI - Generate PG Blurb
nodes.notes: Select an HTTP Header Auth credential owned by jameskoh.kjk@gmail.com. Header name: Authorization. Header value: Bearer YOUR_OPENAI_API_KEY. No API key is stored in this workflow JSON.

nodes.name: Prepare PG Blurb Doc Insert
nodes.notes: Extracts OpenAI response text, applies privacy-safety cleanup, and prepares the text block for Google Docs insertion.

nodes.name: Insert PG Blurb Into Existing PG Pack Doc
nodes.notes: Uses Google Docs OAuth2 credential owned by jameskoh.kjk@gmail.com. Inserts the generated blurb at the end of the existing PG Pack Google Doc.

nodes.name: Prepare Registry Update
nodes.notes: Prepares only the central Property Registry fields to update after successful Google Doc insertion.

nodes.name: Update Central - Property Registry
nodes.notes: Writes only to Clarity V2 - Central Database / Property Registry. Matches on Source Key. Does not write to boss sheets.

main.node: Insert PG Blurb Into Existing PG Pack Doc

meta.description: AI-generated PropertyGuru blurb from Clarity V2 Property Registry, inserted into existing PG Pack Google Doc.
safety: Reads and writes only Clarity V2 Central Database / Property Registry
Does not read or write boss sheets
Processes 1 eligible active listing per run
Uses existing PG Blurb Output Link from Module 4A
Does not pass exact unit number into the OpenAI prompt
Applies privacy-safety cleanup before inserting into Google Docs
